verse_text: 'Then on the Sabbath day you shall offer two unblemished male lambs in their first year, and two-tenths of an ephah of fine flour mixed with oil for a grain offering, with its drink offering.

links.context: to (2) the weekly offerings ([[EXO.20:8]]-11; Lv 23:3; [[NUM.28:9]], [[NUM.28:10]]), to (3) the monthly offerings ([[NUM.28:11]]-15), to (4) the yearly offerings ([[EXO.12:1]]-20; 23:15, 16;

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
